com.mentor.chs.api.report

Interface IXAutoViewDiagramGenerator


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXAutoViewDiagramGenerator

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  IXAutoViewDiagramGenerator.XDiagramGenerationOptions 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int generateAutoViewDiagrams(IXProject sourceProject, IXLogicDesign sourceDesign, IXProject templateProject, java.util.Collection<IXQuery> queries, IXQuery designQuery, IXConnectivityProcessor reportProcessor, java.lang.String styleName, IXAutoViewDiagramProcessor diagramHandler, IXAutoViewDiagramGenerator.XDiagramGenerationOptions diagramGenerationOptions, IXFilterExpression filterExpression)
      Generate autoview diagrams with the following arguments.

    • Method Detail

      • generateAutoViewDiagrams

        int generateAutoViewDiagrams(IXProject sourceProject,
                             IXLogicDesign sourceDesign,
                             IXProject templateProject,
                             java.util.Collection<IXQuery> queries,
                             IXQuery designQuery,
                             IXConnectivityProcessor reportProcessor,
                             java.lang.String styleName,
                             IXAutoViewDiagramProcessor diagramHandler,
                             IXAutoViewDiagramGenerator.XDiagramGenerationOptions diagramGenerationOptions,
                             IXFilterExpression filterExpression)
        Generate autoview diagrams with the following arguments.
        Parameters:
        sourceProject - -- the project which contains the source design and the content queried for.
        sourceDesign - -- the design for which autoview diagrams are to be created ( if null, then all content returned by queries will be rendered to a single diagram).
        templateProject - -- the the project whose designs & diagrams will be used as templates to generate autoview diagram for the given sourceDesign. Designs of the template project will be automatically picked based on the option XTemplateDesignSelectionMethod. if null , diagram generation proceeds without a template.
        queries - -- queries for connectivity in the sourceDesign. A scope for the queries will always be the reference design picked by according to the option provided XTemplateDesignSelectionMethod.
        designQuery - - Query that fetches the selected designs
        reportProcessor - -- connectivity processor to discover further connectivity from query results. if no procesor is provided, Connectivity Between PinLists processor will be chosen
        styleName - -- style name ( from system data).If null, the default style will be chosen.
        diagramHandler - -- handle generated diagrams. Note: These diagrams (IXDiagram objects) dont last beyond the call to process method in the IXAutoViewDiagramProcessor
        diagramGenerationOptions - --- options to generate autoview diagrams.
        filterExpression - -- filter expression to apply on all logic objects entities discovered by the connectivity processor(reportProcessor) and connectivity queries.
        Returns:
        error code 0 -- if sucessfully ran * 1 -- a license could not be checked out. * 2 -- invalid source design/template projects * 4 -- no connectivity could be found.
